overview: GEMORA GLOBAL is a B2B mobile-first website for a luxury imitation jewellery manufacturer and exporter based in Jaipur, India. It targets wholesalers, boutiques, retailers, and international buyers with SEO-optimized pages, a full product catalogue, admin panel, and conversion-focused features.
features: WhatsApp quick-inquiry popup with product auto-fill
Bulk order calculator with dynamic pricing tiers
Admin panel New Arrivals toggle per product
Homepage New Arrivals section showing flagged products
